name: later
description: Defer actions and tasks without losing your current context. Push anything to a later-queue and pop it when you're ready.
long_description:
Later lets you capture deferred actions mid-conversation without interrupting your current task. Push anything — a refactor to do, a bug to investigate, an idea to explore — and pop it back when you're ready.

**Features**
- Push actions to a persistent queue with optional context
- Pop the next action when ready to process it
- Pick a specific action by ID or natural language reference
- Remove one or more actions without executing them
- Clear the entire queue at once
- List queued actions with available command hints
- Configurable storage backend: JSON (default) or markdown-folder (one file per item). Switch via env var or `.claude/later.config.json`
- Works in both Claude Code and Claude Desktop

tools.name: later_push
tools.description: Add a deferred action to the later-queue

tools.name: later_pop
tools.description: Retrieve and remove the next action from the later-queue

tools.name: later_list
tools.description: List all actions currently in the later-queue

tools.name: later_remove
tools.description: Remove a specific action from the later-queue by its ID

tools.name: later_clear
tools.description: Remove all actions from the later-queue at once
